```
1. "use client";
2. 
3. import Link from "next/link";
4. import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react";
5. import {
6.   MetricTile,
7.   SectionHeader,
8.   compactUniverseLabel,
9.   convictionClass,
10.   formatDate,
11.   formatDateTime,
12.   formatPercent,
13.   formatPrice,
14.   isRecommendedPlan,
15.   universeQualifier
16. } from "@/components/market-ui";
17. import { StockSearchBox } from "@/components/stock-search-box";
18. import { buildDailyPerformance, buildPerformanceSummary } from "@/lib/analytics";
19. import type {
20.   HorizonId,
21.   RecommendationDataset,
22.   RecommendationPlan,
23.   SearchAnalysisResult,
24.   StockAnalysis
25. } from "@/lib/types";
26. 
27. type DashboardProps = {
28.   data: RecommendationDataset;
29.   searchedAnalysis: SearchAnalysisResult | null;
30. };
31. 
32. function planScore(plan: RecommendationPlan) {
33.   return plan.score ?? plan.expectedReturnPct;
34. }
35. 
36. function RecommendationIdeaCard({
37.   stock,
38.   plan,
39.   href
40. }: {
41.   stock: StockAnalysis;
42.   plan: RecommendationPlan;
43.   href: string;
44. }) {
45.   return (
46.     <article className="idea-card">
47.       <div className="idea-card-top">
48.         <div className="idea-card-copy">
49.           <div className="idea-symbol-row">
50.             <span className="symbol">{stock.symbol}</span>
51.             <span className="idea-sector">{stock.sector}</span>
52.           </div>
53.           <h3>{stock.companyName}</h3>
54.           <p>
55.             {stock.industry ? `${stock.industry} · ` : ""}
56.             {stock.marketCapBucket} · {stock.liquidityTier}
57.           </p>
58.         </div>
59.         <div className="idea-card-badges">
60.           {typeof plan.rank === "number" ? <span className="rank-chip">#{plan.rank}</span> : null}
61.           <span className={`badge ${convictionClass(plan.conviction)}`}>{plan.conviction}</span>
62.         </div>
63.       </div>
64. 
65.       <div className="idea-metric-grid">
66.         <MetricTile label="CMP" value={formatPrice(stock.currentMarketPrice)} />
67.         <MetricTile label="Entry" value={formatPrice(plan.entryPrice)} />
68.         <MetricTile label="Target" value={formatPrice(plan.targetPrice)} />
69.         <MetricTile label="Stop-loss" value={formatPrice(plan.stopLoss)} />
70.         <MetricTile label="Expected return" value={`${plan.expectedReturnPct.toFixed(2)}%`} />
71.         <MetricTile label="Risk / reward" value={plan.riskReward.toFixed(2)} />
72.       </div>
73. 
74.       <p className="idea-summary">{plan.summary}</p>
75. 
76.       <div className="idea-card-actions">
77.         <span className="idea-card-note">Open the dedicated stock workspace for full analysis.</span>
78.         <Link className="action-link" href={href}>
79.           Open stock page
80.         </Link>
81.       </div>
82.     </article>
83.   );
84. }
85. 
86. export function Dashboard({ data, searchedAnalysis }: DashboardProps) {
87.   const [activeHorizon, setActiveHorizon] = useState<HorizonId>(data.profiles[0]?.id ?? "single_day");
88. 
89.   useEffect(() => {
90.     if (!data.profiles.some((profile) => profile.id === activeHorizon)) {
91.       setActiveHorizon(data.profiles[0]?.id ?? "single_day");
92.     }
93.   }, [activeHorizon, data.profiles]);
94. 
95.   const activeProfile = data.profiles.find((profile) => profile.id === activeHorizon) ?? data.profiles[0];
96.   const localSearchSuggestions = useMemo(
97.     () =>
98.       data.currentBatch.recommendations.map((stock) => ({
99.         symbol: stock.symbol,
100.         companyName: stock.companyName,
101.         sector: stock.sector,
102.         industry: stock.industry
103.       })),
104.     [data.currentBatch.recommendations]
105.   );
106. 
107.   const visibleRecommendations = useMemo(() => {
108.     const sorted = [...data.currentBatch.recommendations].sort(
109.       (left, right) => planScore(right.profiles[activeHorizon]) - planScore(left.profiles[activeHorizon])
110.     );
111.     const recommended = sorted.filter((stock) => isRecommendedPlan(stock.profiles[activeHorizon]));
112. 
113.     return recommended.length ? recommended : sorted.slice(0, 6);
114.   }, [activeHorizon, data.currentBatch.recommendations]);
115. 
116.   const dailyPerformance = useMemo(
117.     () => buildDailyPerformance(data.history, activeHorizon),
118.     [activeHorizon, data.history]
119.   );
120.   const performanceSummary = useMemo(
121.     () => buildPerformanceSummary(dailyPerformance),
122.     [dailyPerformance]
123.   );
124. 
125.   const spotlightStock = visibleRecommendations[0];
126.   const spotlightPlan = spotlightStock?.profiles[activeHorizon];
127.   const searchedStock = searchedAnalysis?.stock;
128.   const searchedHorizonPlans = searchedStock
129.     ? data.profiles.map((profile) => ({
130.         horizon: profile.id,
131.         label: profile.label,
132.         plan: searchedStock.profiles[profile.id]
133.       }))
134.     : [];
135. 
136.   const recommendedCount = data.currentBatch.recommendations.filter((stock) =>
137.     isRecommendedPlan(stock.profiles[activeHorizon])
138.   ).length;
139.   const latestCompletedDate = performanceSummary.latestCompleted?.batchDate
140.     ? formatDate(performanceSummary.latestCompleted.batchDate)
141.     : null;
142.   const sourceProvider = data.dataSource?.provider ?? "Live recommendation loader";
143. 
144.   const overviewCards = [
145.     {
146.       label: "Universe",
147.       value: compactUniverseLabel(data.universe),
148.       footnote: universeQualifier(data.universe)
149.     },
150.     {
151.       label: "Active horizon",
152.       value: activeProfile?.label ?? "n/a",
153.       footnote: activeProfile?.window ?? ""
154.     },
155.     {
156.       label: "Recommended ideas",
157.       value: String(recommendedCount),
158.       footnote: "Current batch shortlist"
159.     },
160.     {
161.       label: "Analyzed stocks",
162.       value: String(data.currentBatch.recommendations.length),
163.       footnote: "Current live coverage"
164.     },
165.     {
166.       label: "Latest completed success rate",
167.       value: formatPercent(performanceSummary.latestCompleted?.successRate ?? null),
168.       footnote: latestCompletedDate ?? "No closed batch yet"
169.     },
170.     {
171.       label: "Average closed return",
172.       value: formatPercent(performanceSummary.averageClosedReturnPct),
173.       footnote: "Across completed batches"
174.     }
175.   ];
176. 
177.   return (
178.     <main className="shell">
179.       <section className="card masthead-card tone-brand">
180.         <div className="masthead-grid">
181.           <div className="masthead-copy">
182.             <span className="section-eyebrow">Institutional-style NSE dashboard</span>
183.             <h1>Indian equities recommendation console</h1>
184.             <p>
185.               The home dashboard now stays stable: use it to scan the current shortlist, inspect
186.               batch health, and jump into dedicated stock or archive workspaces when you need deep
187.               analysis.
188.             </p>
189.           </div>
190. 
191.           <div className="masthead-summary">
192.             <MetricTile label="Latest batch" value={formatDateTime(data.currentBatch.generatedAt)} />
193.             <MetricTile label="Market scope" value={`${data.exchange} · ${compactUniverseLabel(data.universe)}`} />
194.             <MetricTile
195.               label="Source mode"
196.               value={`${data.dataSource?.mode.toUpperCase() ?? "LIVE"} · ${sourceProvider}`}
197.               footnote={data.currentBatch.batchDate}
198.             />
199.           </div>
200.         </div>
201.       </section>
202. 
203.       <section className="section-cluster">
204.         <SectionHeader
205.           eyebrow="Screening"
206.           title="Search and market snapshot"
207.           subtitle="Use autocomplete to analyze any stock, then jump into the separate detail workspace only when you want a full breakdown."
208.           tone="search"
209.         />
210. 
211.         <div className="top-panels">
212.           <section className="card search-card tone-search">
213.             <div className="panel-title">
214.               <span className="panel-kicker">Stock lookup</span>
215.               <h3>Search and analyze any NSE stock</h3>
216.               <p>Type a symbol or company name, select a suggestion, and review the model verdict.</p>
217.             </div>
218. 
219.             <StockSearchBox
220.               initialQuery={searchedAnalysis?.query ?? ""}
221.               localSuggestions={localSearchSuggestions}
222.             />
223.           </section>
224. 
225.           <section className="card status-card tone-overview">
226.             <div className="panel-title">
227.               <span className="panel-kicker">Batch snapshot</span>
228.               <h3>Live market context</h3>
229.               <p>Quick context for the currently rendered batch and active recommendation profile.</p>
230.             </div>
231. 
232.             <div className="mini-metric-grid">
233.               <MetricTile label="Exchange" value={data.exchange} />
234.               <MetricTile label="Active profile" value={activeProfile?.label ?? "n/a"} />
235.               <MetricTile label="Window" value={activeProfile?.window ?? "n/a"} />
236.               <MetricTile label="Recommended ideas" value={String(recommendedCount)} />
237.             </div>
238.           </section>
239.         </div>
240.       </section>
241. 
242.       {searchedAnalysis ? (
243.         <section className="section-cluster">
244.           <SectionHeader
245.             eyebrow="Search verdict"
246.             title="Searched stock analysis"
247.             subtitle="This verdict uses the same live scoring engine as the ranked shortlist, then lets you open a dedicated stock page for full context."
248.             tone="search"
249.           />
250. 
251.           <section className="card search-analysis-card tone-search">
252.             <div className="panel-banner">
253.               <div>
254.                 <span className="panel-kicker">Recommendation verdict</span>
255.                 <h3>{searchedAnalysis.query.toUpperCase()}</h3>
256.               </div>
257.               <span
258.                 className={`result-chip ${
259.                   searchedAnalysis.status === "analyzed"
260.                     ? searchedAnalysis.shouldConsider
261.                       ? "success"
262.                       : "danger"
263.                     : "neutral"
264.                 }`}
265.               >
266.                 {searchedAnalysis.status === "analyzed"
267.                   ? searchedAnalysis.shouldConsider
268.                     ? "Consider"
269.                     : "Avoid for now"
270.                   : searchedAnalysis.status === "not_found"
271.                     ? "Not found"
272.                     : "Analysis unavailable"}
273.               </span>
274.             </div>
275. 
276.             <p className="summary">{searchedAnalysis.verdict}</p>
277.             {searchedAnalysis.message ? <p className="footnote">{searchedAnalysis.message}</p> : null}
278. 
279.             {searchedStock ? (
280.               <>
281.                 <div className="detail-subhead">
282.                   {searchedStock.companyName} ({searchedStock.symbol}) · {searchedStock.sector}
283.                   {searchedStock.industry ? ` · ${searchedStock.industry}` : ""} · CMP{" "}
284.                   {formatPrice(searchedStock.currentMarketPrice)}
285.                 </div>
286. 
287.                 <div className="search-result-grid">
288.                   {searchedHorizonPlans.map(({ horizon, label, plan }) => (
289.                     <article key={horizon} className="stat-card tone-overview">
290.                       <span className="panel-kicker">{label}</span>
291.                       <strong>{isRecommendedPlan(plan) ? "Consider" : "Do not consider"}</strong>
292.                       <div className="search-plan-line">
293.                         Score {plan.score?.toFixed(1) ?? "n/a"} · {plan.conviction} conviction
294.                       </div>
295.                       <div className="search-plan-line">
296.                         Entry {formatPrice(plan.entryPrice)} · Target {formatPrice(plan.targetPrice)}
297.                       </div>
298.                       <div className="search-plan-line">
299.                         Stop {formatPrice(plan.stopLoss)} · R:R {plan.riskReward.toFixed(2)}
300.                       </div>
301.                     </article>
302.                   ))}
303.                 </div>
304. 
305.                 <div className="panel-actions">
306.                   <Link className="action-link" href={`/stocks/${searchedStock.symbol}`}>
307.                     Open full stock workspace
308.                   </Link>
309.                 </div>
310.               </>
311.             ) : null}
312.           </section>
313.         </section>
314.       ) : null}
315. 
316.       <section className="section-cluster">
317.         <SectionHeader
318.           eyebrow="Market summary"
319.           title="Key coverage metrics"
320.           subtitle="A quick operating readout for coverage, active profile, and recent recommendation quality."
321.           tone="overview"
322.         />
323. 
324.         <section className="overview-grid">
325.           {overviewCards.map((card) => (
326.             <article key={card.label} className="card overview-card tone-overview">
327.               <div className="metric-label">{card.label}</div>
328.               <div className="metric-value">{card.value}</div>
329.               <div className="footnote">{card.footnote}</div>
330.             </article>
331.           ))}
332.         </section>
333.       </section>
334. 
335.       <section className="section-cluster">
336.         <SectionHeader
337.           eyebrow="Recommendation workspace"
338.           title="Live ideas with dedicated detail pages"
339.           subtitle="Clicking a stock now opens its own workspace instead of changing unrelated panels lower on the dashboard."
340.           tone="brand"
341.         />
342. 
343.         <section className="workspace-grid">
344.           <section className="card tone-brand">
345.             <div className="panel-title panel-title-split">
346.               <div>
347.                 <span className="panel-kicker">Ranked shortlist</span>
348.                 <h3>Today&apos;s ranked ideas</h3>
349.                 <p>Use the horizon switcher to reshuffle the shortlist, then open any stock page for deep research.</p>
350.               </div>
351. 
352.               <div className="pills">
353.                 {data.profiles.map((profile) => (
354.                   <button
355.                     key={profile.id}
356.                     className={`pill${profile.id === activeHorizon ? " active" : ""}`}
357.                     onClick={() => setActiveHorizon(profile.id)}
358.                     type="button"
359.                   >
360.                     {profile.label}
361.                   </button>
362.                 ))}
363.               </div>
364.             </div>
365. 
366.             <div className="idea-list">
367.               {visibleRecommendations.map((stock) => (
368.                 <RecommendationIdeaCard
369.                   key={stock.symbol}
370.                   stock={stock}
371.                   plan={stock.profiles[activeHorizon]}
372.                   href={`/stocks/${stock.symbol}`}
373.                 />
374.               ))}
375.             </div>
376.           </section>
377. 
378.           <aside className="spotlight-rail">
379.             {spotlightStock && spotlightPlan ? (
380.               <section className="card tone-brand">
381.                 <div className="panel-title">
382.                   <span className="panel-kicker">Top idea for this horizon</span>
383.                   <h3>
384.                     {spotlightStock.companyName} <span className="inline-meta">({spotlightStock.symbol})</span>
385.                   </h3>
386.                   <p>
387.                     {spotlightStock.sector}
388.                     {spotlightStock.industry ? ` · ${spotlightStock.industry}` : ""}
389.                     {" · "}
390.                     CMP {formatPrice(spotlightStock.currentMarketPrice)}
391.                   </p>
392.                 </div>
393. 
394.                 <div className="mini-metric-grid">
395.                   <MetricTile label="Score" value={spotlightPlan.score?.toFixed(1) ?? "n/a"} />
396.                   <MetricTile label="Expected return" value={`${spotlightPlan.expectedReturnPct.toFixed(2)}%`} />
397.                   <MetricTile label="Risk / reward" value={spotlightPlan.riskReward.toFixed(2)} />
398.                   <MetricTile label="Conviction" value={spotlightPlan.conviction} />
399.                 </div>
400. 
401.                 <p className="summary">{spotlightPlan.summary}</p>
402. 
403.                 <div className="panel-actions">
404.                   <Link className="action-link" href={`/stocks/${spotlightStock.symbol}`}>
405.                     Open full analysis
406.                   </Link>
407.                 </div>
408.               </section>
409.             ) : null}
410. 
411.             <section className="card tone-history">
412.               <div className="panel-title">
413.                 <span className="panel-kicker">Archive workspace</span>
414.                 <h3>Review previous recommendation batches</h3>
415.                 <p>
416.                   The batch archive and scorecards now live on their own page so the home dashboard stays focused on current-market work.
417.                 </p>
418.               </div>
419. 
420.               <div className="action-grid">
421.                 <MetricTile
422.                   label="Latest completed success rate"
423.                   value={formatPercent(performanceSummary.latestCompleted?.successRate ?? null)}
424.                   footnote={latestCompletedDate ?? "No closed batch yet"}
425.                 />
426.                 <MetricTile

429.                   footnote="Across completed batches"
430.                 />
431.               </div>
432. 
433.               <div className="panel-actions">
434.                 <Link className="action-link" href="/history">
435.                   Open archive page
436.                 </Link>
437.               </div>
438.             </section>
439.           </aside>
440.         </section>
441.       </section>
442.     </main>
443.   );
444. }
```

```
1. "use client";
2. 
3. import Link from "next/link";
4. import type { ReactNode } from "react";
5. import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from "react";
6. import {
7.   EmptyState,
8.   MetricTile,
9.   SectionHeader,
10.   SignalSection,
11.   StockOutcomeCard,
12.   formatCrore,
13.   formatNumber,
14.   formatPrice,
15.   isRecommendedPlan,
16.   normalizeSymbol
17. } from "@/components/market-ui";
18. import { buildStockPerformanceHistory } from "@/lib/analytics";
19. import type {
20.   HorizonId,
21.   RecommendationDataset,
22.   SearchAnalysisResult,
23.   StockAnalysis,
24.   StockPerformanceHistoryEntry
25. } from "@/lib/types";
26. 
27. type StockDetailProps = {
28.   data: RecommendationDataset;
29.   analysis: SearchAnalysisResult | null;
30.   requestedSymbol: string;
31. };
32. 
33. function defaultHorizon(data: RecommendationDataset, analysis: SearchAnalysisResult | null) {
34.   const preferred = analysis?.recommendedHorizons?.[0];
35. 
36.   if (preferred && data.profiles.some((profile) => profile.id === preferred)) {
37.     return preferred;
38.   }
39. 
40.   return data.profiles[0]?.id ?? "single_day";
41. }
42. 
43. function DetailRow({
44.   left,
45.   right
46. }: {
47.   left: ReactNode | null;
48.   right?: ReactNode | null;
49. }) {
50.   if (!left && !right) {
51.     return null;
52.   }
53. 
54.   if (!left || !right) {
55.     return <div className="detail-row single">{left ?? right}</div>;
56.   }
57. 
58.   return (
59.     <div className="detail-row">
60.       {left}
61.       {right}
62.     </div>
63.   );
64. }
65. 
66. export function StockDetail({ data, analysis, requestedSymbol }: StockDetailProps) {
67.   const fallbackStock = data.currentBatch.recommendations.find(
68.     (stock) => normalizeSymbol(stock.symbol) === normalizeSymbol(requestedSymbol)
69.   );
70.   const stock = (analysis?.stock ?? fallbackStock) as StockAnalysis | null;
71.   const [activeHorizon, setActiveHorizon] = useState<HorizonId>(() => defaultHorizon(data, analysis));
72.   const stockHistory = useMemo<StockPerformanceHistoryEntry[]>(
73.     () => (stock ? buildStockPerformanceHistory(data.history, stock.symbol, activeHorizon) : []),
74.     [activeHorizon, data.history, stock]
75.   );
76. 
77.   useEffect(() => {
78.     const nextDefault = defaultHorizon(data, analysis);
79. 
80.     if (!data.profiles.some((profile) => profile.id === activeHorizon)) {
81.       setActiveHorizon(nextDefault);
82.     }
83.   }, [activeHorizon, analysis, data.profiles]);
84. 
85.   if (!stock) {
86.     return (
87.       <main className="shell">
88.         <section className="card masthead-card tone-risk">
89.           <div className="panel-banner">
90.             <div className="masthead-copy">
91.               <span className="section-eyebrow">Stock workspace</span>
92.               <h1>Stock not available</h1>
93.               <p>
94.                 I could not build a stock detail page for <strong>{requestedSymbol.toUpperCase()}</strong>{" "}
95.                 from the current live dataset.
96.               </p>
97.             </div>
98.             <div className="page-links">
99.               <Link className="secondary-link" href="/">
100.                 Back to dashboard
101.               </Link>
102.             </div>
103.           </div>
104. 
105.           <EmptyState message={analysis?.message ?? "Try searching another NSE symbol from the dashboard."} />
106.         </section>
107.       </main>
108.     );
109.   }
110. 
111.   const activeProfile = data.profiles.find((profile) => profile.id === activeHorizon) ?? data.profiles[0];
112.   const selectedPlan = stock.profiles[activeHorizon];
113. 
114.   const horizonPlans = data.profiles.map((profile) => ({
115.     ...profile,
116.     plan: stock.profiles[profile.id]
117.   }));
118. 
119.   const verdictTone =
120.     analysis?.status === "analyzed"
121.       ? analysis.shouldConsider
122.         ? "success"
123.         : "danger"
124.       : "neutral";
125.   const primaryVerdict = analysis?.status === "analyzed" ? analysis.verdict : selectedPlan.summary;
126.   const technicalCard = (
127.     <SignalSection
128.       title="Technical analysis"
129.       subtitle="Momentum, structure, and trend readings used in the model."
130.       signals={selectedPlan.technicalSignals}
131.       tone="technical"
132.     />
133.   );
134.   const fundamentalAnalysisCard = (
135.     <SignalSection
136.       title="Fundamental analysis"
137.       subtitle="Business quality and valuation context from the fundamentals layer."
138.       signals={selectedPlan.fundamentalSignals}
139.       tone="fundamental"
140.     />
141.   );
142.   const sentimentAnalysisCard = (
143.     <SignalSection
144.       title="Sentiment and news"
145.       subtitle="Headline tone, earnings cues, and external narrative signals."
146.       signals={selectedPlan.sentimentSignals}
147.       tone="sentiment"
148.     />
149.   );
150.   const riskCard = (
151.     <SignalSection
152.       title="Risk controls"
153.       subtitle="Stop-loss learning, fragility checks, and downside guardrails."
154.       signals={selectedPlan.riskSignals}
155.       tone="risk"
156.     />
157.   );
158.   const earningsCard = (
159.     <SignalSection
160.       title="Earnings lens"
161.       subtitle="Recent earnings-related cues extracted from the research layer."
162.       signals={selectedPlan.earningsSignals}
163.       tone="fundamental"
164.     />
165.   );
166.   const analystCard = (
167.     <SignalSection
168.       title="Analyst lens"
169.       subtitle="Revision and broker-tone style cues reflected in the model overlays."
170.       signals={selectedPlan.analystSignals}
171.       tone="sentiment"
172.     />
173.   );
174.   const fundamentalsSnapshotCard = stock.fundamentals ? (
175.     <section className="card tone-fundamental">
176.       <div className="panel-title">
177.         <span className="panel-kicker">Fundamental snapshot</span>
178.         <h3>Business context</h3>
179.         <p>Key business and profitability markers from the fundamentals layer.</p>
180.       </div>
181. 
182.       <div className="mini-metric-grid">
183.         <MetricTile label="Market cap" value={formatCrore(stock.fundamentals.marketCapCrore)} />
184.         <MetricTile label="Revenue" value={formatCrore(stock.fundamentals.revenueCrore)} />
185.         <MetricTile label="Profit" value={formatCrore(stock.fundamentals.profitCrore)} />
186.         <MetricTile
187.           label="ROE"
188.           value={
189.             stock.fundamentals.returnOnEquityPct !== null
190.               ? `${stock.fundamentals.returnOnEquityPct.toFixed(1)}%`
191.               : "n/a"
192.           }
193.         />
194.       </div>
195.     </section>
196.   ) : null;
197.   const sentimentSnapshotCard = stock.sentiment ? (
198.     <section className="card tone-sentiment">
199.       <div className="panel-title">
200.         <span className="panel-kicker">Sentiment snapshot</span>
201.         <h3>Headline tone summary</h3>
202.         <p>Quick counts from the headline-based sentiment layer.</p>
203.       </div>
204. 
205.       <div className="mini-metric-grid">
206.         <MetricTile label="Overall tone" value={stock.sentiment.overall} />
207.         <MetricTile label="Sentiment score" value={stock.sentiment.score.toFixed(1)} />
208.         <MetricTile label="Positive headlines" value={formatNumber(stock.sentiment.positiveCount)} />
209.         <MetricTile label="Negative headlines" value={formatNumber(stock.sentiment.negativeCount)} />
210.       </div>
211.     </section>
212.   ) : null;
213.   const headlinesCard = stock.sentiment?.headlines?.length ? (
214.     <section className="card tone-sentiment">
215.       <div className="panel-title">
216.         <span className="panel-kicker">Recent headlines</span>
217.         <h3>Latest sentiment inputs</h3>
218.         <p>Recent headlines that influenced the narrative layer.</p>
219.       </div>
220. 
221.       <div className="headline-list">
222.         {stock.sentiment.headlines.slice(0, 6).map((headline, index) => (
223.           <article key={`${headline.title}-${index}`} className="headline-item">
224.             <strong>{headline.title}</strong>
225.             <span className="headline-meta">
226.               {headline.source} · {headline.category} · {headline.tone}
227.             </span>
228.           </article>
229.         ))}
230.       </div>
231.     </section>
232.   ) : null;
233.   const researchContextCard = selectedPlan.newsContext?.length ? (
234.     <section className="card category-panel tone-history">
235.       <div className="panel-title">
236.         <span className="panel-kicker">Research context</span>
237.         <h3>Headline and market context</h3>
238.         <p>Supporting notes that provide extra narrative behind the current setup.</p>
239.       </div>
240.       <ul className="list">
241.         {selectedPlan.newsContext.map((note, index) => (
242.           <li key={`${note}-${index}`}>{note}</li>
243.         ))}
244.       </ul>
245.     </section>
246.   ) : null;
247. 
248.   return (
249.     <main className="shell">
250.       <section className="card masthead-card tone-brand">
251.         <div className="page-utility-row">
252.           <div className="page-links">
253.             <Link className="secondary-link" href="/">
254.               Dashboard
255.             </Link>
256.             <Link className="secondary-link" href="/history">
257.               Archive
258.             </Link>
259.           </div>
260.         </div>
261. 
262.         <div className="panel-banner">
263.           <div className="masthead-copy">
264.             <span className="section-eyebrow">Dedicated stock workspace</span>
265.             <h1>
266.               {stock.companyName} <span className="inline-meta">({stock.symbol})</span>
267.             </h1>
268.             <p>
269.               {stock.sector}
270.               {stock.industry ? ` · ${stock.industry}` : ""}
271.               {" · "}
272.               {stock.marketCapBucket} · {stock.liquidityTier} · CMP {formatPrice(stock.currentMarketPrice)}
273.             </p>
274.           </div>
275. 
276.           <span className={`result-chip ${verdictTone}`}>
277.             {analysis?.status === "analyzed"
278.               ? analysis.shouldConsider
279.                 ? "Consider"
280.                 : "Avoid for now"
281.               : "Current batch stock"}
282.           </span>
283.         </div>
284. 
285.         <p className="summary">{primaryVerdict}</p>
286. 
287.         <div className="pills">
288.           {data.profiles.map((profile) => (
289.             <button
290.               key={profile.id}
291.               className={`pill${profile.id === activeHorizon ? " active" : ""}`}
292.               onClick={() => setActiveHorizon(profile.id)}
293.               type="button"
294.             >
295.               {profile.label}
296.             </button>
297.           ))}
298.         </div>
299.       </section>
300. 
301.       <section className="section-cluster">
302.         <SectionHeader
303.           eyebrow="Trade plan"
304.           title="Execution summary for the selected horizon"
305.           subtitle="This page is isolated from the dashboard so you can review the stock without other panels shifting around."
306.           tone="brand"
307.         />
308. 
309.         <section className="detail-summary-grid">
310.           <MetricTile label="Horizon" value={activeProfile?.label ?? "n/a"} footnote={activeProfile?.window} />
311.           <MetricTile label="Score" value={selectedPlan.score?.toFixed(1) ?? "n/a"} />
312.           <MetricTile label="Entry price" value={formatPrice(selectedPlan.entryPrice)} />
313.           <MetricTile label="Target price" value={formatPrice(selectedPlan.targetPrice)} />
314.           <MetricTile label="Stop-loss" value={formatPrice(selectedPlan.stopLoss)} />
315.           <MetricTile label="Risk / reward" value={selectedPlan.riskReward.toFixed(2)} />
316.         </section>
317.       </section>
318. 
319.       <section className="section-cluster">
320.         <SectionHeader
321.           eyebrow="Cross-horizon view"
322.           title="How this stock scores across horizons"
323.           subtitle="Compare the recommendation outcome across single-day, swing, position, and long-term profiles."
324.           tone="overview"
325.         />
326. 
327.         <section className="search-result-grid">
328.           {horizonPlans.map((profile) => (
329.             <article key={profile.id} className="stat-card tone-overview">
330.               <span className="panel-kicker">{profile.label}</span>
331.               <strong>{isRecommendedPlan(profile.plan) ? "Consider" : "Do not consider"}</strong>
332.               <div className="search-plan-line">
333.                 Score {profile.plan.score?.toFixed(1) ?? "n/a"} · {profile.plan.conviction} conviction
334.               </div>
335.               <div className="search-plan-line">
336.                 Entry {formatPrice(profile.plan.entryPrice)} · Target {formatPrice(profile.plan.targetPrice)}
337.               </div>
338.               <div className="search-plan-line">
339.                 Stop {formatPrice(profile.plan.stopLoss)} · R:R {profile.plan.riskReward.toFixed(2)}
340.               </div>
341.             </article>
342.           ))}
343.         </section>
344.       </section>
345. 
346.       <section className="section-cluster">
347.         <SectionHeader
348.           eyebrow="Research workspace"
349.           title="Aligned analysis panels"
350.           subtitle="Related cards now share the same row tracks so the page reads left-to-right instead of as two unrelated vertical stacks."
351.           tone="overview"
352.         />
353. 
354.         <section className="detail-analysis-layout">
355.           <section className="card tone-overview">
356.             <div className="panel-title panel-title-split">
357.               <div>
358.                 <span className="panel-kicker">Model rationale</span>
359.                 <h3>Why the model likes or rejects this setup</h3>
360.                 <p>The main ranked drivers behind the current recommendation.</p>
361.               </div>
362. 
363.               <div className="page-links">
364.                 <Link className="secondary-link" href="/">
365.                   Back to dashboard
366.                 </Link>
367.                 <Link className="secondary-link" href="/history">
368.                   Open archive page
369.                 </Link>
370.               </div>
371.             </div>
372. 
373.             <ul className="list">
374.               {selectedPlan.drivers.map((driver) => (
375.                 <li key={driver}>{driver}</li>
376.               ))}
377.             </ul>
378. 
379.             {stock.fundamentals ? <p className="footnote">{stock.fundamentals.summary}</p> : null}
380.           </section>
381. 
382.           <DetailRow left={technicalCard} right={fundamentalsSnapshotCard} />
383.           <DetailRow left={fundamentalAnalysisCard} right={sentimentSnapshotCard} />
384.           <DetailRow left={sentimentAnalysisCard} right={headlinesCard} />
385.           <DetailRow left={riskCard} right={earningsCard} />
386.           <DetailRow left={analystCard} right={researchContextCard} />
387.         </section>
388.       </section>
389. 
390.       <section className="section-cluster">
391.         <SectionHeader
392.           eyebrow="Historical outcomes"
393.           title="How earlier calls played out"
394.           subtitle="These cards show whether the target was achieved, the stop-loss was hit, or the trade remains open."
395.           tone="history"
396.         />
397. 
398.         <section className="card tone-history">
399.           <div className="history-result-grid">
400.             {stockHistory.length ? (
401.               stockHistory.map((item, index) => (
402.                 <StockOutcomeCard
403.                   key={`${item.batchDate}-${item.outcome.result}-${index}`}
404.                   item={item}
405.                 />
406.               ))
407.             ) : (
408.               <EmptyState message="This stock does not yet have a stored recommendation history." />
409.             )}
410.           </div>
411.         </section>
412.       </section>
413.     </main>
414.   );
415. }
416.
```

</details>

```
1. import { StockDetail } from "@/components/stock-detail";
2. import type { SearchAnalysisResult } from "@/lib/types";
3. import { analyzeSearchSymbol, loadRecommendationData } from "@/lib/recommendation-data";
4. 
5. export const dynamic = "force-dynamic";
6. 
7. type StockPageProps = {
8.   params: Promise<{
9.     symbol: string;
10.   }>;
11. };
12. 
13. export default async function StockPage({ params }: StockPageProps) {
14.   const routeParams = await params;
15.   const symbol = typeof routeParams.symbol === "string" ? routeParams.symbol : "";
16.   const dataset = await loadRecommendationData();
17.   const analysis: SearchAnalysisResult | null = symbol
18.     ? await analyzeSearchSymbol(symbol, dataset)
19.     : null;
20. 
21.   return <StockDetail data={dataset} analysis={analysis} requestedSymbol={symbol} />;
22. }
23.
```

C:\copilot\apps\web\components\market-ui.tsx (lines 1-260)

```
1. import type {
2.   DailyPerformance,
3.   HistoricalStockRecommendation,
4.   HorizonId,
5.   RecommendationPlan,
6.   Signal,
7.   StockPerformanceHistoryEntry
8. } from "@/lib/types";
9. 
10. export type AccentTone =
11.   | "brand"
12.   | "search"
13.   | "overview"
14.   | "technical"
15.   | "fundamental"
16.   | "sentiment"
17.   | "risk"
18.   | "history";
19. 
20. export function formatPrice(value: number) {
21.   return new Intl.NumberFormat("en-IN", {
22.     style: "currency",
23.     currency: "INR",
24.     minimumFractionDigits: 2,
25.     maximumFractionDigits: 2
26.   }).format(value);
27. }
28. 
29. export function formatNumber(value: number, maximumFractionDigits = 0) {
30.   return new Intl.NumberFormat("en-IN", {
31.     maximumFractionDigits
32.   }).format(value);
33. }
34. 
35. export function formatCrore(value: number | null) {
36.   if (value === null) {
37.     return "n/a";
38.   }
39. 
40.   return `${formatNumber(value)} Cr`;
41. }
42. 
43. export function formatPercent(value: number | null) {
44.   if (value === null) {
45.     return "Pending";
46.   }
47. 
48.   return `${value.toFixed(2)}%`;
49. }
50. 
51. export function formatDate(value: string) {
52.   return new Date(value).toLocaleDateString("en-IN");
53. }
54. 
55. export function formatDateTime(value: string) {
56.   return new Date(value).toLocaleString("en-IN");
57. }
58. 
59. export function convictionClass(conviction: RecommendationPlan["conviction"]) {
60.   return conviction.toLowerCase();
61. }
62. 
63. export function isRecommendedPlan(plan: RecommendationPlan | { isRecommended?: boolean }) {
64.   return plan.isRecommended ?? true;
65. }
66. 
67. export function historyDecisionLabel(result: "target_hit" | "stop_loss_hit" | "open") {
68.   switch (result) {
69.     case "target_hit":
70.       return "Achieved";
71.     case "stop_loss_hit":
72.       return "Not achieved";
73.     default:
74.       return "Open";
75.   }
76. }
77. 
78. export function successRateTone(successRate: number | null) {
79.   if (successRate === null) {
80.     return "neutral";
81.   }
82. 
83.   if (successRate >= 60) {
84.     return "success";
85.   }
86. 
87.   if (successRate < 40) {
88.     return "danger";
89.   }
90. 
91.   return "neutral";
92. }
93. 
94. export function compactUniverseLabel(value: string) {
95.   return value.replace(/\s*\([^)]*\)\s*$/, "");
96. }
97. 
98. export function universeQualifier(value: string) {
99.   const match = value.match(/\(([^)]+)\)/);
100.   return match?.[1] ?? value;
101. }
102. 
103. export function normalizeSymbol(value: string) {
104.   return value.trim().toUpperCase().replace(/\.NS$/i, "");
105. }
106. 
107. export function SectionHeader({
108.   eyebrow,
109.   title,
110.   subtitle,
111.   tone = "brand"
112. }: {
113.   eyebrow: string;
114.   title: string;
115.   subtitle: string;
116.   tone?: AccentTone;
117. }) {
118.   return (
119.     <div className={`section-header tone-${tone}`}>
120.       <span className="section-eyebrow">{eyebrow}</span>
121.       <h2>{title}</h2>
122.       <p className="section-copy">{subtitle}</p>
123.     </div>
124.   );
125. }
126. 
127. export function MetricTile({
128.   label,
129.   value,
130.   footnote
131. }: {
132.   label: string;
133.   value: string;
134.   footnote?: string;
135. }) {
136.   return (
137.     <article className="metric-tile">
138.       <span className="metric-label">{label}</span>
139.       <strong>{value}</strong>
140.       {footnote ? <span className="metric-footnote">{footnote}</span> : null}
141.     </article>
142.   );
143. }
144. 
145. export function SignalSection({
146.   title,
147.   subtitle,
148.   signals,
149.   tone
150. }: {
151.   title: string;
152.   subtitle: string;
153.   signals?: Signal[];
154.   tone: AccentTone;
155. }) {
156.   if (!signals?.length) {
157.     return null;
158.   }
159. 
160.   return (
161.     <section className={`card category-panel tone-${tone}`}>
162.       <div className="panel-title">
163.         <span className="panel-kicker">{title}</span>
164.         <h3>{title}</h3>
165.         <p>{subtitle}</p>
166.       </div>
167.       <div className="signal-tile-grid">
168.         {signals.map((signal) => (
169.           <article key={`${title}-${signal.name}`} className="signal-tile">
170.             <span className="signal-name">{signal.name}</span>
171.             <strong>{signal.value}</strong>
172.           </article>
173.         ))}
174.       </div>
175.     </section>
176.   );
177. }
178. 
179. export function EmptyState({ message }: { message: string }) {
180.   return <div className="empty-state">{message}</div>;
181. }
182. 
183. export function DailyPerformanceCard({ item }: { item: DailyPerformance }) {
184.   const tone = successRateTone(item.successRate);
185. 
186.   return (
187.     <article className={`performance-card ${tone}`}>
188.       <div className="performance-card-top">
189.         <div>
190.           <span className="panel-kicker">Trading day</span>
191.           <h3>{formatDate(item.batchDate)}</h3>
192.         </div>
193.         <span className={`result-chip ${tone}`}>
194.           {item.successRate === null
195.             ? "Pending"
196.             : item.successRate >= 60
197.               ? "Strong"
198.               : item.successRate < 40
199.                 ? "Weak"
200.                 : "Mixed"}
201.         </span>
202.       </div>
203. 
204.       <div className="mini-metric-grid">
205.         <MetricTile label="Success rate" value={formatPercent(item.successRate)} />
206.         <MetricTile label="Closed calls" value={String(item.closed)} />
207.         <MetricTile label="Winners" value={String(item.successful)} />
208.         <MetricTile label="Stops" value={String(item.failed)} />
209.       </div>
210.     </article>
211.   );
212. }
213. 
214. export function HistoryRecommendationCard({
215.   stock,
216.   activeHorizon
217. }: {
218.   stock: HistoricalStockRecommendation;
219.   activeHorizon: HorizonId;
220. }) {
221.   const plan = stock.profiles[activeHorizon];
222. 
223.   return (
224.     <article className="history-result-card">
225.       <div className="history-result-top">
226.         <div>
227.           <span className="panel-kicker">Recommendation</span>
228.           <h3>
229.             {stock.companyName} <span className="inline-meta">({stock.symbol})</span>
230.           </h3>
231.           <p>{stock.sector}</p>
232.         </div>
233.         <span className={`badge ${convictionClass(plan.conviction)}`}>{plan.conviction}</span>
234.       </div>
235. 
236.       <div className="mini-metric-grid">
237.         <MetricTile label="Entry" value={formatPrice(plan.entryPrice)} />
238.         <MetricTile label="Target" value={formatPrice(plan.targetPrice)} />
239.         <MetricTile label="Stop-loss" value={formatPrice(plan.stopLoss)} />
240.         <MetricTile label="Score" value={plan.score?.toFixed(1) ?? "n/a"} />
241.       </div>
242. 
243.       <p className="idea-summary">{plan.summary}</p>
244.     </article>
245.   );
246. }
247. 
248. export function StockOutcomeCard({ item }: { item: StockPerformanceHistoryEntry }) {
249.   return (
250.     <article className={`stock-outcome-card ${item.outcome.result}`}>
251.       <div className="history-result-top">
252.         <div>
253.           <span className="panel-kicker">Previous recommendation</span>
254.           <h3>{formatDate(item.batchDate)}</h3>
255.           <p>
256.             Entry {formatPrice(item.entryPrice)} · Target {formatPrice(item.targetPrice)} · Stop{" "}
257.             {formatPrice(item.stopLoss)}
258.           </p>
259.         </div>
260.         <span
```

```
870. 
871. function barsFromPayload(payload: YahooChartResponse) {
872.   const result = payload.chart?.result?.[0];
873.   const quote = result?.indicators?.quote?.[0];
874.   const timestamps = result?.timestamp ?? [];
875.   const opens = quote?.open ?? [];
876.   const highs = quote?.high ?? [];
877.   const lows = quote?.low ?? [];
878.   const closes = quote?.close ?? [];
879.   const volumes = quote?.volume ?? [];
880.   const bars: PriceBar[] = [];
881. 
882.   for (let index = 0; index < timestamps.length; index += 1) {
883.     const open = opens[index];
884.     const high = highs[index];
885.     const low = lows[index];
886.     const close = closes[index];
887.     const volume = volumes[index];
888. 
889.     if (
890.       open === null ||
891.       high === null ||
892.       low === null ||
893.       close === null ||
894.       volume === null ||
895.       open === undefined ||
896.       high === undefined ||
897.       low === undefined ||
898.       close === undefined ||
899.       volume === undefined
900.     ) {
901.       continue;
902.     }
903. 
904.     bars.push({
905.       date: tradingDate(timestamps[index]),
906.       timestamp: timestamps[index],
907.       open,
908.       high,
909.       low,
910.       close,
911.       volume
912.     });
913.   }
914. 
915.   return {
916.     bars,
917.     meta: result?.meta ?? {}
918.   };
919. }
920. 
921. async function fetchSeries(entry: UniverseEntry) {
922.   const payload = await fetchChartPayload(entry.yahooSymbol);
923. 
924.   if (!payload) {
925.     return null;
926.   }
927. 
928.   const parsed = barsFromPayload(payload);
929. 
930.   if (!parsed.bars.length) {
931.     return null;
932.   }
933. 
934.   const research = entry.symbol.startsWith("^")
935.     ? {
936.         companyName: companyNameFromMeta(parsed.meta, entry.fallbackCompanyName),
937.         sector: entry.sector,
938.         industry: entry.industry,
939.         fundamentals: null,
940.         sentiment: null
941.       }
942.     : await fetchCompanyResearch({
943.         symbol: entry.symbol,
944.         yahooSymbol: entry.yahooSymbol,
945.         companyName: companyNameFromMeta(parsed.meta, entry.fallbackCompanyName),
946.         sector: entry.sector,
947.         industry: entry.industry
948.       });
949.   const companyName = research.companyName || companyNameFromMeta(parsed.meta, entry.fallbackCompanyName);
950. 
951.   return {
952.     ...entry,
953.     companyName,
954.     bars: parsed.bars,
955.     indexByDate: new Map(parsed.bars.map((bar, index) => [bar.date, index])),
956.     meta: parsed.meta,
957.     sector: research.sector || entry.sector,
958.     industry: research.industry ?? entry.industry,
959.     marketCapBucket: marketCapBucketFromCrore(research.fundamentals?.marketCapCrore ?? null),
960.     liquidityTier: liquidityTierFromVolume(parsed.meta.regularMarketVolume ?? parsed.bars.at(-1)?.volume ?? null),
961.     fundamentals: research.fundamentals,
962.     sentiment: research.sentiment
963.   } satisfies MarketSeries;
964. }
965. 
966. function benchmarkReturn(benchmark: MarketSeries, date: string, lookback: number) {
967.   const benchmarkIndex = benchmark.indexByDate.get(date);
968. 
969.   if (benchmarkIndex === undefined || benchmarkIndex < lookback) {
970.     return null;
971.   }
972. 
973.   return pctChange(
974.     benchmark.bars[benchmarkIndex].close,
975.     benchmark.bars[benchmarkIndex - lookback].close
976.   );
977. }
978. 
979. function snapshotMetrics(series: MarketSeries, benchmark: MarketSeries, index: number): SnapshotMetrics | null {
980.   if (index < 200) {
981.     return null;
982.   }
983. 
984.   const bars = series.bars.slice(0, index + 1);
985.   const current = bars.at(-1);
986. 
987.   if (!current) {
988.     return null;
989.   }
990. 
991.   const previous = bars.at(-2) ?? null;
992.   const closes = bars.map((bar) => bar.close);
993.   const highs = bars.map((bar) => bar.high);
994.   const lows = bars.map((bar) => bar.low);
995.   const volumes = bars.map((bar) => bar.volume);
996.   const sma20 = simpleMovingAverage(closes, 20);
997.   const sma50 = simpleMovingAverage(closes, 50);
998.   const sma200 = simpleMovingAverage(closes, 200);
999.   const atr14 = averageTrueRange(bars, 14);
1000.   const avgVolume20 = average(volumes.slice(-20));
1001.   const fiftyTwoWeekHigh = Math.max(...highs.slice(-252));
1002.   const fiftyTwoWeekLow = Math.min(...lows.slice(-252));
1003. 
1004.   return {
1005.     date: current.date,
1006.     companyName: series.companyName,
1007.     currentPrice: current.close,
1008.     previousClose: previous?.close ?? null,
1009.     sessionChangePct: previous ? pctChange(current.close, previous.close) : null,
1010.     sma20,
1011.     sma50,
1012.     sma200,
1013.     rsi14: relativeStrengthIndex(closes, 14),
1014.     atr14,
1015.     atrPct: atr14 ? pctChange(current.close + atr14, current.close) : null,
1016.     return20: closes.length > 20 ? pctChange(current.close, closes[closes.length - 21]) : null,
1017.     return60: closes.length > 60 ? pctChange(current.close, closes[closes.length - 61]) : null,
1018.     return120: closes.length > 120 ? pctChange(current.close, closes[closes.length - 121]) : null,
1019.     benchmarkReturn20: benchmarkReturn(benchmark, current.date, 20),
1020.     benchmarkReturn60: benchmarkReturn(benchmark, current.date, 60),
1021.     benchmarkReturn120: benchmarkReturn(benchmark, current.date, 120),
1022.     relativeStrength20: null,
1023.     relativeStrength60: null,
1024.     relativeStrength120: null,
1025.     volatility20: annualizedVolatility(closes, 20),
1026.     avgVolume20,
1027.     volumeRatio: avgVolume20 ? current.volume / avgVolume20 : null,
1028.     rangePosition: rangePosition(current.close, fiftyTwoWeekLow, fiftyTwoWeekHigh),
1029.     fiftyTwoWeekHigh,
1030.     fiftyTwoWeekLow,
1031.     distanceFromHighPct: pctChange(current.close, fiftyTwoWeekHigh),
1032.     distanceFromLowPct: fiftyTwoWeekLow ? pctChange(current.close, fiftyTwoWeekLow) : null,
1033.     benchmarkSessionChangePct: (() => {
1034.       const benchmarkIndex = benchmark.indexByDate.get(current.date);
1035. 
1036.       if (benchmarkIndex === undefined || benchmarkIndex === 0) {
1037.         return null;
1038.       }
1039. 
1040.       return pctChange(
1041.         benchmark.bars[benchmarkIndex].close,
1042.         benchmark.bars[benchmarkIndex - 1].close
1043.       );
1044.     })(),
1045.     currentVolume: current.volume
1046.   };
1047. }
1048. 
1049. function enrichRelativeStrength(metrics: SnapshotMetrics): SnapshotMetrics {
1050.   return {
1051.     ...metrics,
1052.     relativeStrength20:
1053.       metrics.return20 !== null && metrics.benchmarkReturn20 !== null
1054.         ? metrics.return20 - metrics.benchmarkReturn20
1055.         : null,
1056.     relativeStrength60:
1057.       metrics.return60 !== null && metrics.benchmarkReturn60 !== null
1058.         ? metrics.return60 - metrics.benchmarkReturn60
1059.         : null,
1060.     relativeStrength120:
1061.       metrics.return120 !== null && metrics.benchmarkReturn120 !== null
1062.         ? metrics.return120 - metrics.benchmarkReturn120
1063.         : null
1064.   };
1065. }
1066. 
1067. function normalizeRsi(rsi: number | null) {
1068.   if (rsi === null) {
1069.     return 0.5;
1070.   }
1071. 
1072.   return 1 - clamp(Math.abs(rsi - 56) / 24, 0, 1);
1073. }
1074. 
1075. function liquidityScore(liquidityTier: string) {
1076.   return liquidityTier === "Tier 1" ? 1 : 0.7;
1077. }
1078. 
1079. function marketCapScore(marketCapBucket: string) {
1080.   return marketCapBucket === "Large Cap" ? 1 : 0.75;
1081. }
1082. 
1083. function scoreForHorizon(metrics: SnapshotMetrics, entry: UniverseEntry, horizon: HorizonId) {
1084.   switch (horizon) {
1085.     case "single_day":
1086.       return weightedScore([
1087.         [0.24, scaleRange(metrics.sessionChangePct, -2.8, 4.8)],
1088.         [0.2, scaleRange(metrics.relativeStrength20, -5, 8)],
1089.         [0.16, scaleRange(metrics.volumeRatio, 0.8, 2.2)],
1090.         [0.14, metrics.sma20 && metrics.currentPrice > metrics.sma20 ? 1 : 0],
1091.         [0.1, metrics.previousClose && metrics.currentPrice > metrics.previousClose ? 1 : 0],
1092.         [0.08, normalizeRsi(metrics.rsi14)],
1093.         [0.08, inverseScale(metrics.atrPct, 1.2, 4.8)]
1094.       ]);
1095.     case "swing":
1096.       return weightedScore([
1097.         [0.24, scaleRange(metrics.return20, -8, 16)],
1098.         [0.18, scaleRange(metrics.relativeStrength20, -6, 10)],
1099.         [0.12, metrics.sma20 && metrics.currentPrice > metrics.sma20 ? 1 : 0],
1100.         [0.11, metrics.sma50 && metrics.currentPrice > metrics.sma50 ? 1 : 0],
1101.         [0.1, metrics.sma20 && metrics.sma50 && metrics.sma20 > metrics.sma50 ? 1 : 0],
1102.         [0.1, normalizeRsi(metrics.rsi14)],
1103.         [0.08, scaleRange(metrics.volumeRatio, 0.75, 1.8)],
1104.         [0.07, inverseScale(metrics.volatility20, 18, 50)]
1105.       ]);
1106.     case "position":
1107.       return weightedScore([
1108.         [0.23, scaleRange(metrics.return60, -12, 22)],
1109.         [0.18, scaleRange(metrics.relativeStrength60, -8, 14)],
1110.         [0.13, metrics.sma50 && metrics.currentPrice > metrics.sma50 ? 1 : 0],
1111.         [0.13, metrics.sma200 && metrics.currentPrice > metrics.sma200 ? 1 : 0],
1112.         [0.12, metrics.sma50 && metrics.sma200 && metrics.sma50 > metrics.sma200 ? 1 : 0],
1113.         [0.09, scaleRange(metrics.rangePosition, 30, 95)],
1114.         [0.07, inverseScale(metrics.volatility20, 18, 48)],
1115.         [0.05, scaleRange(metrics.volumeRatio, 0.8, 1.6)]
1116.       ]);
1117.     case "long_term":
1118.       return weightedScore([
1119.         [0.25, scaleRange(metrics.return120, -15, 30)],
1120.         [0.18, scaleRange(metrics.relativeStrength120, -10, 18)],
1121.         [0.16, metrics.sma200 && metrics.currentPrice > metrics.sma200 ? 1 : 0],
1122.         [0.12, scaleRange(metrics.rangePosition, 28, 95)],
1123.         [0.09, scaleRange(metrics.distanceFromHighPct, -35, 0)],
1124.         [0.08, inverseScale(metrics.volatility20, 16, 45)],
1125.         [0.07, marketCapScore(entry.marketCapBucket)],
1126.         [0.05, liquidityScore(entry.liquidityTier)]
1127.       ]);
1128.   }
1129. }
1130. 
1131. function blendedModelScore(entry: MarketSeries, metrics: SnapshotMetrics, horizon: HorizonId) {
1132.   const technicalScore = scoreForHorizon(metrics, entry, horizon);
1133.   const fundamentalScore = scoreFundamentals(entry.fundamentals ?? null);
1134.   const sentimentScore = scoreSentiment(entry.sentiment ?? null);
1135.   const earningsScore = scoreEarningsSignal(entry.sentiment ?? null);
1136.   const analystScore = scoreAnalystSignal(entry.sentiment ?? null);
1137. 
1138.   switch (horizon) {
1139.     case "single_day":
1140.       return roundMetric(
1141.         technicalScore * 0.8 +
1142.           fundamentalScore * 0.04 +
1143.           sentimentScore * 0.08 +
1144.           earningsScore * 0.04 +
1145.           analystScore * 0.04
1146.       );
1147.     case "swing":
1148.       return roundMetric(
1149.         technicalScore * 0.72 +
1150.           fundamentalScore * 0.08 +
1151.           sentimentScore * 0.1 +
1152.           earningsScore * 0.05 +
1153.           analystScore * 0.05
1154.       );
1155.     case "position":
1156.       return roundMetric(
1157.         technicalScore * 0.6 +
1158.           fundamentalScore * 0.18 +
1159.           sentimentScore * 0.1 +
1160.           earningsScore * 0.06 +
1161.           analystScore * 0.06
1162.       );
1163.     case "long_term":
1164.       return roundMetric(
1165.         technicalScore * 0.52 +
1166.           fundamentalScore * 0.24 +
1167.           sentimentScore * 0.08 +
1168.           earningsScore * 0.08 +
1169.           analystScore * 0.08
1170.       );
```

</details>

```
1170.       );

1173. 
1174. function projectedPct(score: number, [minPct, maxPct]: [number, number]) {
1175.   const normalizedScore = scaleRange(score, 45, 85);
1176.   return minPct + (maxPct - minPct) * normalizedScore;
1177. }
1178. 
1179. function stopLossFragilityFeedback(
1180.   metrics: SnapshotMetrics,
1181.   horizon: HorizonId,
1182.   learning: StopLossLearning | null
1183. ) {
1184.   let fragilityPenalty = 0;
1185.   const reasons: string[] = [];
1186.   const signals: Signal[] = [];
1187. 
1188.   if ((metrics.volumeRatio ?? 1) < 0.95) {
1189.     fragilityPenalty += horizon === "single_day" ? 1.8 : 1.2;
1190.     reasons.push("volume confirmation is weak");
1191.     signals.push({ name: "Volume confirmation", value: ratioText(metrics.volumeRatio) });
1192.   }
1193. 
1194.   if ((metrics.volatility20 ?? 0) > (horizon === "single_day" ? 30 : horizon === "swing" ? 38 : 44)) {
1195.     fragilityPenalty += horizon === "single_day" ? 2.2 : 1.6;
1196.     reasons.push("volatility is elevated");
1197.     signals.push({ name: "20D volatility", value: percentText(metrics.volatility20) });
1198.   }
1199. 
1200.   if ((metrics.rsi14 ?? 50) > 72) {
1201.     fragilityPenalty += 1.4;
1202.     reasons.push("RSI is stretched");
1203.     signals.push({
1204.       name: "RSI stretch",
1205.       value: metrics.rsi14 !== null ? roundMetric(metrics.rsi14).toFixed(1) : "n/a"
1206.     });
1207.   }
1208. 
1209.   if ((horizon === "single_day" || horizon === "swing") && metrics.sma20 && metrics.currentPrice < metrics.sma20) {
1210.     fragilityPenalty += 1.8;
1211.     reasons.push("price is below 20DMA support");
1212.     signals.push({
1213.       name: "Price vs 20DMA",
1214.       value: percentText(pctChange(metrics.currentPrice, metrics.sma20))
1215.     });
1216.   }
1217. 
1218.   if ((metrics.relativeStrength20 ?? 0) < 0) {
1219.     fragilityPenalty += horizon === "single_day" ? 1.8 : 1.2;
1220.     reasons.push("short-term relative strength is negative");
1221.     signals.push({
1222.       name: "Short-term relative strength",
1223.       value: percentText(metrics.relativeStrength20)
1224.     });
1225.   }
1226. 
1227.   if (horizon === "single_day" && (metrics.sessionChangePct ?? 0) < 0) {
1228.     fragilityPenalty += 1.8;
1229.     reasons.push("the latest session faded into the close");
1230.     signals.push({ name: "Latest session", value: percentText(metrics.sessionChangePct) });
1231.   }
1232. 
1233.   const learningPenalty = learning?.penalty ?? 0;
1234.   const totalPenalty = roundMetric(clamp(fragilityPenalty + learningPenalty, 0, 15));
1235.   const learningNote =
1236.     learning?.note ??
1237.     (learningPenalty
1238.       ? `Recent ${profileFor(horizon).label.toLowerCase()} stop-loss history increases caution.`
1239.       : null);
1240. 
1241.   return {
1242.     penalty: totalPenalty,
1243.     reasons: learningNote ? [...reasons, learningNote] : reasons,
1244.     signals: [
1245.       { name: "Fragility penalty", value: `${roundMetric(fragilityPenalty).toFixed(1)} pts` },
1246.       { name: "Learning penalty", value: `${roundMetric(learningPenalty).toFixed(1)} pts` },
1247.       ...(learning
1248.         ? [
1249.             { name: "Recent stop-losses", value: `${learning.recentStopLosses}` },
1250.             { name: "Quick stop-losses", value: `${learning.quickStopLosses}` }
1251.           ]
1252.         : []),
1253.       ...signals
1254.     ].slice(0, 6)
1255.   };
1256. }
1257. 
1258. function buildTradePlan(
1259.   metrics: SnapshotMetrics,
1260.   entry: MarketSeries,
1261.   horizon: HorizonId,
1262.   learning: StopLossLearning | null = null
1263. ): PlanTemplate {
1264.   const settings = HORIZON_SETTINGS[horizon];
1265.   const rawScore = blendedModelScore(entry, metrics, horizon);
1266.   const technicalScore = scoreForHorizon(metrics, entry, horizon);
1267.   const fundamentalScore = scoreFundamentals(entry.fundamentals ?? null);
1268.   const sentimentScore = scoreSentiment(entry.sentiment ?? null);
1269.   const earningsScore = scoreEarningsSignal(entry.sentiment ?? null);
1270.   const analystScore = scoreAnalystSignal(entry.sentiment ?? null);
1271.   const riskFeedback = stopLossFragilityFeedback(metrics, horizon, learning);
1272.   const score = roundMetric(clamp(rawScore - riskFeedback.penalty, 0, 100));
1273.   const atrPct = metrics.atrPct ?? (settings.targetRangePct[0] * 0.45);
1274.   const entryPrice = roundPrice(metrics.currentPrice);
1275.   const targetPct = Math.max(
1276.     projectedPct(score, settings.targetRangePct),
1277.     atrPct * settings.atrTargetMultiple
1278.   );
1279.   const stopPct = Math.max(
1280.     projectedPct(100 - score, settings.stopRangePct),
1281.     atrPct * settings.atrStopMultiple
1282.   );
1283.   const targetPrice = roundPrice(entryPrice * (1 + targetPct / 100));
1284.   const stopLoss = roundPrice(Math.max(entryPrice * (1 - stopPct / 100), entryPrice * 0.7));
1285.   const expectedReturnPct = pctChange(targetPrice, entryPrice) ?? 0;
1286.   const riskReward = roundMetric((targetPrice - entryPrice) / Math.max(entryPrice - stopLoss, 0.01));
1287.   const conviction = convictionFromScore(score);
1288.   const strengthLabel = horizonRelativeStrengthLabel(metrics, horizon);
1289.   const returnLabel = horizonMomentumLabel(metrics, horizon);
1290.   const summaryBase = horizonSummary(entry, metrics, horizon);
1291.   const summary =
1292.     riskFeedback.reasons.length && riskFeedback.penalty > 0
1293.       ? `${summaryBase} Risk controls trimmed the setup because ${riskFeedback.reasons[0]}.`
1294.       : summaryBase;
1295. 
1296.   const drivers = [
1297.     `${HORIZON_SETTINGS[horizon].label} score ${signalScoreText(score)} blends technical ${signalScoreText(technicalScore)}, fundamental ${signalScoreText(fundamentalScore)}, and sentiment ${signalScoreText(sentimentScore)} inputs.`,
1298.     `Relative strength versus Nifty 50 is ${strengthLabel}, while RSI (14) is ${metrics.rsi14 !== null ? roundMetric(metrics.rsi14).toFixed(1) : "n/a"}.`,
1299.     `Volume is running at ${ratioText(metrics.volumeRatio)} of the 20-day average with 20D volatility at ${percentText(metrics.volatility20)}.`,
1300.     entry.fundamentals
1301.       ? `Fundamentals show ${entry.fundamentals.salesGrowthLabel ?? "mixed"} sales growth (${entry.fundamentals.salesGrowth5YPct !== null ? `${roundMetric(entry.fundamentals.salesGrowth5YPct).toFixed(2)}%` : "n/a"}) and ${entry.fundamentals.returnOnEquityLabel ?? "mixed"} ROE (${entry.fundamentals.returnOnEquityPct !== null ? `${roundMetric(entry.fundamentals.returnOnEquityPct).toFixed(2)}%` : "n/a"}).`
1302.       : `Fundamental data is unavailable, so the model leans more heavily on price structure and liquidity.`
1303.   ];
1304. 
1305.   if (riskFeedback.penalty > 0 && riskFeedback.reasons.length) {
1306.     drivers.push(
1307.       `Stop-loss learning trims the score by ${riskFeedback.penalty.toFixed(1)} points because ${riskFeedback.reasons.join("; ")}.`
1308.     );
1309.   } else {
1310.     drivers.push("Risk controls found no material recent stop-loss pattern that required a score penalty.");
1311.   }
1312. 
1313.   const technicalSignals: Signal[] = [
1314.     { name: "Adjusted score", value: signalScoreText(score) },
1315.     { name: "Raw blended score", value: signalScoreText(rawScore) },
1316.     { name: "Technical score", value: signalScoreText(technicalScore) },
1317.     {
1318.       name: horizonMomentumSignalName(horizon),
1319.       value: returnLabel
1320.     },
1321.     {
1322.       name: horizonRelativeStrengthSignalName(horizon),
1323.       value: strengthLabel
1324.     },
1325.     {
1326.       name: "Price vs 50DMA",
1327.       value: metrics.sma50 ? percentText(pctChange(metrics.currentPrice, metrics.sma50)) : "n/a"
1328.     },
1329.     {
1330.       name: "Price vs 200DMA",
1331.       value: metrics.sma200 ? percentText(pctChange(metrics.currentPrice, metrics.sma200)) : "n/a"
1332.     }
1333.   ];
1334. 
1335.   const fundamentalSignals: Signal[] = entry.fundamentals
1336.     ? [
1337.         { name: "Fundamental score", value: signalScoreText(fundamentalScore) },
1338.         { name: "Market cap", value: croreText(entry.fundamentals.marketCapCrore) },
1339.         { name: "Revenue", value: croreText(entry.fundamentals.revenueCrore) },
1340.         { name: "Profit", value: croreText(entry.fundamentals.profitCrore) },
1341.         {
1342.           name: "5Y sales growth",
1343.           value:
1344.             entry.fundamentals.salesGrowth5YPct !== null
1345.               ? `${roundMetric(entry.fundamentals.salesGrowth5YPct).toFixed(2)}%`
1346.               : "n/a"
1347.         },
1348.         {
1349.           name: "ROE",
1350.           value:
1351.             entry.fundamentals.returnOnEquityPct !== null
1352.               ? `${roundMetric(entry.fundamentals.returnOnEquityPct).toFixed(2)}%`
1353.               : "n/a"
1354.         },
1355.         {
1356.           name: "Promoter holding",
1357.           value:
1358.             entry.fundamentals.promoterHoldingPct !== null
1359.               ? `${roundMetric(entry.fundamentals.promoterHoldingPct).toFixed(2)}%`
1360.               : "n/a"
1361.         }
1362.       ]
1363.     : [
1364.         { name: "Fundamental score", value: signalScoreText(fundamentalScore) },
1365.         { name: "Market cap bucket", value: entry.marketCapBucket },
1366.         { name: "Liquidity tier", value: entry.liquidityTier },
1367.         { name: "20D volatility", value: percentText(metrics.volatility20) },
1368.         {
1369.           name: "52W range position",
1370.           value:
1371.             metrics.rangePosition !== null ? `${roundMetric(metrics.rangePosition).toFixed(1)}%` : "n/a"
1372.         }
1373.       ];
1374. 
1375.   const sentimentSignals: Signal[] = entry.sentiment
1376.     ? [
1377.         { name: "Sentiment score", value: signalScoreText(sentimentScore) },
1378.         { name: "Overall tone", value: entry.sentiment.overall },
1379.         {
1380.           name: "Headline balance",
1381.           value: `${entry.sentiment.positiveCount} positive / ${entry.sentiment.negativeCount} negative`
1382.         },
1383.         { name: "Neutral headlines", value: `${entry.sentiment.neutralCount}` }
1384.       ]
1385.     : [{ name: "Sentiment score", value: signalScoreText(sentimentScore) }];
1386. 
1387.   const earningsSignals: Signal[] = [
1388.     { name: "Earnings headline score", value: signalScoreText(earningsScore) },
1389.     {
1390.       name: "Earnings mentions",
1391.       value: `${entry.sentiment?.earningsMentionCount ?? 0} recent headlines`
1392.     }
1393.   ];
1394. 
1395.   const analystSignals: Signal[] = [
1396.     { name: "Analyst tone score", value: signalScoreText(analystScore) },
1397.     {
1398.       name: "Analyst mentions",
1399.       value: `${entry.sentiment?.analystMentionCount ?? 0} recent headlines`
1400.     }
1401.   ];
1402. 
1403.   const marketContext = [
1404.     `Latest session change: ${percentText(metrics.sessionChangePct)} while Nifty 50 moved ${percentText(metrics.benchmarkSessionChangePct)}.`,
1405.     `Current price ${priceText(metrics.currentPrice)} versus 52-week range ${priceText(metrics.fiftyTwoWeekLow)} to ${priceText(metrics.fiftyTwoWeekHigh)}.`,
1406.     `Current volume ${compactNumber(metrics.currentVolume)} versus 20-day average ${compactNumber(metrics.avgVolume20)}.`,
1407.     ...(entry.sentiment?.headlines.slice(0, 3).map((headline) => `${headline.source}: ${headline.title}`) ?? [])
1408.   ];
1409. 
1410.   return {
1411.     score,
1412.     conviction,
1413.     entryPrice,
1414.     targetPrice,
1415.     stopLoss,
1416.     expectedReturnPct: roundMetric(expectedReturnPct),
1417.     riskReward,
1418.     summary,
1419.     drivers,
1420.     technicalSignals,
1421.     fundamentalSignals,
1422.     sentimentSignals,
1423.     earningsSignals,
1424.     analystSignals,
1425.     riskSignals: riskFeedback.signals,
```

```
520.   return `${new Intl.NumberFormat("en-IN", {

524. 
525. function marketCapBucketFromCrore(value: number | null) {
526.   if (value === null) {
527.     return "Large Cap";
528.   }
529. 
530.   if (value >= 100000) {
531.     return "Large Cap";
532.   }
533. 
534.   if (value >= 30000) {
535.     return "Mid Cap";
536.   }
537. 
538.   return "Small Cap";
539. }
540. 
541. function liquidityTierFromVolume(volume: number | null) {
542.   if (volume === null) {
543.     return "Tier 2";
544.   }
545. 
546.   if (volume >= 5000000) {
547.     return "Tier 1";
548.   }
549. 
550.   if (volume >= 1000000) {
551.     return "Tier 2";
552.   }
553. 
554.   return "Tier 3";
555. }
556. 
557. function simpleMovingAverage(values: number[], period: number) {
558.   if (values.length < period) {
559.     return null;
560.   }
561. 
562.   return average(values.slice(-period));
563. }
564. 
565. function annualizedVolatility(closes: number[], period: number) {
566.   if (closes.length < period + 1) {
567.     return null;
568.   }
569. 
570.   const window = closes.slice(-(period + 1));
571.   const returns = window.slice(1).map((close, index) => (close - window[index]) / window[index]);
572.   const mean = average(returns);
573. 
574.   if (mean === null) {
575.     return null;
576.   }
577. 
578.   const variance =
579.     returns.reduce((total, value) => total + (value - mean) ** 2, 0) / returns.length;
580. 
581.   return Math.sqrt(variance) * Math.sqrt(252) * 100;
582. }
583. 
584. function relativeStrengthIndex(closes: number[], period: number) {
585.   if (closes.length <= period) {
586.     return null;
587.   }
588. 
589.   let gains = 0;
590.   let losses = 0;
591.   const window = closes.slice(-(period + 1));
592. 
593.   for (let index = 1; index < window.length; index += 1) {
594.     const change = window[index] - window[index - 1];
595. 
596.     if (change > 0) {
597.       gains += change;
598.     } else {
599.       losses += Math.abs(change);
600.     }
601.   }
602. 
603.   if (losses === 0) {
604.     return 100;
605.   }
606. 
607.   const averageGain = gains / period;
608.   const averageLoss = losses / period;
609.   const relativeStrength = averageGain / averageLoss;
610. 
611.   return 100 - 100 / (1 + relativeStrength);
612. }
613. 
614. function averageTrueRange(bars: PriceBar[], period: number) {
615.   if (bars.length <= period) {
616.     return null;
617.   }
618. 
619.   const window = bars.slice(-(period + 1));
620.   const trueRanges: number[] = [];
621. 
622.   for (let index = 1; index < window.length; index += 1) {
623.     const current = window[index];
624.     const previous = window[index - 1];
625.     const trueRange = Math.max(
626.       current.high - current.low,
627.       Math.abs(current.high - previous.close),
628.       Math.abs(current.low - previous.close)
629.     );
630.     trueRanges.push(trueRange);
631.   }
632. 
633.   return average(trueRanges);
634. }
635. 
636. function rangePosition(current: number, low: number, high: number) {
637.   if (high <= low) {
638.     return null;
639.   }
640. 
641.   return ((current - low) / (high - low)) * 100;
642. }
643. 
644. function tradingDate(timestamp: number) {
645.   return new Date(timestamp * 1000).toISOString().slice(0, 10);
646. }
647. 
648. function publishedTimestamp(date: string) {
649.   return `${date}T15:45:00+05:30`;
650. }
651. 
652. function signalScoreText(value: number) {
653.   return `${roundMetric(value).toFixed(1)}/100`;
654. }
655. 
656. function companyNameFromMeta(meta: ChartMeta, fallbackCompanyName: string) {
657.   return meta.longName ?? meta.shortName ?? fallbackCompanyName;
658. }
659. 
660. function convictionFromScore(score: number) {
661.   if (score >= 74) {
662.     return "High";
663.   }
664. 
665.   if (score >= 60) {
666.     return "Medium";
667.   }
668. 
669.   return "Low";
670. }
671. 
672. function weightedScore(parts: Array<[number, number]>) {
673.   const total = parts.reduce((sum, [weight, score]) => sum + weight * score, 0);
674.   return roundMetric(total * 100);
675. }
676. 
677. function resolveDataDirectoryFromSample(samplePath: string) {
678.   return path.dirname(samplePath);
679. }
680. 
681. async function findFirstReadableFile(candidates: string[]) {
682.   for (const candidate of candidates) {
683.     try {
684.       await readFile(candidate, "utf-8");
685.       return candidate;
686.     } catch {
687.       continue;
688.     }
689.   }
690. 
691.   return null;
692. }
693. 
694. async function readJsonFile<T>(filePath: string) {
695.   const payload = await readFile(filePath, "utf-8");
696.   return JSON.parse(payload) as T;
697. }
698. 
699. function sampleFileCandidates() {
700.   return DATA_DIRECTORY_CANDIDATES.map((directory) => path.join(directory, SAMPLE_FILE_NAME));
701. }
702. 
703. async function generatedFilePath() {
704.   const samplePath = await findFirstReadableFile(sampleFileCandidates());
705.   const directory = samplePath
706.     ? resolveDataDirectoryFromSample(samplePath)
707.     : DATA_DIRECTORY_CANDIDATES[0];
708. 
709.   await mkdir(directory, { recursive: true });
710. 
711.   return path.join(directory, GENERATED_FILE_NAME);
712. }
713. 
714. function cloneSingleDayPlanFromFallback(plan: RecommendationPlan): RecommendationPlan {
715.   const settings = HORIZON_SETTINGS.single_day;
716.   const entryPrice = roundPrice(plan.entryPrice);
717.   const targetPct = clamp(
718.     Math.abs(pctChange(plan.targetPrice, plan.entryPrice) ?? plan.expectedReturnPct) * 0.38,
719.     settings.targetRangePct[0],
720.     settings.targetRangePct[1]
721.   );
722.   const stopPct = clamp(
723.     Math.abs(pctChange(plan.stopLoss, plan.entryPrice) ?? settings.stopRangePct[0]) * 0.45,
724.     settings.stopRangePct[0],
725.     settings.stopRangePct[1]
726.   );
727.   const targetPrice = roundPrice(entryPrice * (1 + targetPct / 100));
728.   const stopLoss = roundPrice(Math.max(entryPrice * (1 - stopPct / 100), entryPrice * 0.85));
729. 
730.   return {
731.     ...plan,
732.     score: plan.score ?? 55,
733.     conviction: plan.conviction === "High" ? "Medium" : plan.conviction,
734.     entryPrice,
735.     targetPrice,
736.     stopLoss,
737.     expectedReturnPct: roundMetric(pctChange(targetPrice, entryPrice) ?? targetPct),
738.     riskReward: roundMetric((targetPrice - entryPrice) / Math.max(entryPrice - stopLoss, 0.01)),
739.     summary: `Fallback single-day setup derived from the saved swing profile. ${plan.summary}`,
740.     drivers: [
741.       "This single-day view was synthesized from the saved swing setup because the cached dataset predates the single-day model.",
742.       ...plan.drivers
743.     ].slice(0, 4),
744.     technicalSignals: [
745.       { name: "Compatibility mode", value: "Derived from swing profile" },
746.       ...plan.technicalSignals
747.     ].slice(0, 6),
748.     riskSignals: plan.riskSignals ?? [
749.       { name: "Learning status", value: "Awaiting refreshed live batch" }
750.     ]
751.   };
752. }
753. 
754. function cloneSingleDayHistoricalPlanFromFallback(plan: HistoricalRecommendationPlan): HistoricalRecommendationPlan {
755.   return {
756.     ...plan,
757.     conviction: plan.conviction === "High" ? "Medium" : plan.conviction,
758.     summary: `Fallback single-day history derived from the saved swing result. ${plan.summary}`,
759.     outcome: {
760.       ...plan.outcome,
```
